tracks.meaning: a device that controls the flow of fluid or gas through a pipe or opening by means of a movable part
a fold of tissue in the heart or veins that allows blood to flow in only one direction
a structure in plants that regulates the passage of water and nutrients through vascular tissue
a mechanism in software or hardware that controls access to or release of resources or data
to open and close a valve or to regulate flow by operating a valve
a device on a brass instrument that when pressed changes the pitch of the note
a person regarded as controlling the flow or distribution of something valuable or important
